---
title: "Web of Science"
page-layout: article
---

# Web of Science

## Description

Multidisciplinary citation index covering journals, conference proceedings, data sets, and scholarly resources. Supports literature review, citation analysis, and research impact assessment.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Humanities & History, Scholarly Literature
- **Data/resource type:** Scholarly Indexes & Literature
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Scholarly Indexes & Literature

## Links

- [Access resource](https://hdl.handle.net/10079/yuldb/yuldb1332)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
